narrative:
Prairie-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 814 registered voters, with 65.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
